result.stdout:
> nugetz — A modern CLI for NuGet packages

USAGE:
  nugetz <command> [options]

COMMANDS:
  install <package>   Install a NuGet package into one or more projects
  search  <query>    Search for NuGet packages
  info    <package>   Show detailed package information

OPTIONS:
  --help, -h          Show help
  --version           Show version

commands.payload:
> nugetz — A modern CLI for NuGet packages

USAGE:
  nugetz <command> [options]

COMMANDS:
  install <package>   Install a NuGet package into one or more projects
  search  <query>    Search for NuGet packages
  info    <package>   Show detailed package information

OPTIONS:
  --help, -h          Show help
  --version           Show version

result.stdout: ✗ Missing package name. Usage: nugetz install <package>

commands.payload: ✗ Missing package name. Usage: nugetz install <package>
